center.name: Southern Andean Yungas
center.summary: Southern Andean Yungas是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Yungas dove、Red-backed sierra finch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Southern Andean Yungas of Bolivia and northern Chile and Argentina, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Yungas dove is found in the Bolivian and Southern Andean Yungas on the east slope of the Andes of Bolivia and northwestern Argentina
